title: NIO Inc. American depositary shares Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Wall Street's 2024 quarterly expectations: Q4 2024 expected loss of 42 cents per share on revenues of $2.85 billion with 18.3% year-over-year growth. Bottom-line projection indicated improvement from loss of 45 cents in year-ago period. Loss estimate widened by 2 cents over 60 days. Q2 2024 expectations: revenue $2.45 billion, up about 96% year-over-year; loss of $0.31 per share. For 2025: Zacks consensus estimates revenue $14.2 billion, up 46.3% year over year. NIO expanded beyond luxury lineup with ONVO brand launch, with L60 deliveries commencing September 2024, 19,929 L60 units sold in Q4 2024.
